'''nabosho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:yajman|yajman]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-b-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yajman|yajman]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| nabosho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:næbesheth|næbesheth]] || [[word:næbeshej|næbeshej]] || [[word:næbeshesh|næbeshesh]] || [[word:næbeshe|næbeshe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:naboboshoth|naboboshoth]] || [[word:naboboshoj|naboboshoj]] || [[word:naboboshosh|naboboshosh]] || [[word:nabobosho|nabobosho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:naboshoth|naboshoth]] || [[word:naboshoj|naboshoj]] || [[word:naboshosh|naboshosh]] || [[word:nabosho|nabosho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:nabofshoth|nabofshoth]] || [[word:nabofshoj|nabofshoj]] || [[word:nabofshosh|nabofshosh]] || [[word:nabofshof|nabofshof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:naboshotho|naboshotho]] || [[word:naboshojo|naboshojo]] || [[word:naboshosho|naboshosho]] || [[word:naboshoko|naboshoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:naboshoth|naboshoth]] || [[word:naboshoj|naboshoj]] || [[word:naboshosh|naboshosh]] || [[word:nabosho|nabosho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:naboshothol|naboshothol]] || [[word:naboshojol|naboshojol]] || [[word:naboshoshol|naboshoshol]] || [[word:naboshokol|naboshokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:naboshothotho|naboshothotho]] || [[word:naboshojojo|naboshojojo]] || [[word:naboshoshosho|naboshoshosho]] || [[word:naboshoko|naboshoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:naboshothon|naboshothon]] || [[word:naboshojon|naboshojon]] || [[word:naboshoshon|naboshoshon]] || [[word:naboshokon|naboshokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:naboshothoro|naboshothoro]] || [[word:naboshojoro|naboshojoro]] || [[word:naboshoshoro|naboshoshoro]] || [[word:naboshokoro|naboshokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|17228b0}}
